meta.title: Bruno Merino — IT Analyst & Developer
meta.description: Custom web development, ERP integrations, process automation and databases. PC tech support in Cipolletti and Neuquén, Argentina.

hero.tagline: Custom web development, ERP integrations, process automation and databases.

services.heading: Software and hardware, handled
services.subtitle: From code to the machine: whatever your business or project needs to run.

web.title: Custom websites
web.desc: Fast, modern pages (Next.js): catalogs, landing pages, company sites. From domain to deploy, ready to go.

apps.title: App development
apps.desc: Custom web and mobile apps tailored to what your business or project needs.

automation.title: Automation & integrations
automation.desc: Connecting systems, ERPs and external services (n8n, APIs) to remove manual work and let data flow on its own.

maintenance.title: PC maintenance
maintenance.desc: Cleaning, optimization and tune-up of computers.

repair.title: Diagnosis & repair
repair.desc: Detecting and fixing hardware and software issues.

build.title: PC builds & advice
build.desc: Personalized quoting and component analysis based on budget and use (gaming, work, editing).
build.note: Online advice across the country; on-site builds in Cipolletti and Neuquén.

talk.title: We talk
talk.desc: I learn what you need and who it's for.

build.title: Build
build.desc: I develop with progress you can see.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.desc: I ship it online and working.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subtitle: A few recent works, between client and internal projects.

ranquel.name: El Ranquel
ranquel.desc: Online B2B catalog for a wholesale distributor. Lets clients and nurseries browse the product catalog quickly and clearly.
ranquel.longDesc: A wholesale catalog built so clients and nurseries can find products fast, with no account required. Category browsing, clear product cards and quick loading for a smooth experience on both desktop and mobile.

hermosilla.name: Julian Hermosilla Lawyer
hermosilla.desc: Company website for a law firm in Neuquén / Río Negro. A professional presentation of legal services with a clean design focused on driving contact.
hermosilla.longDesc: A company website for a law firm, with a professional presentation of its practice areas and a focus on driving inquiries. Clean, fast and designed to build trust from the first moment.

fstrack.name: FSTrack
fstrack.desc: Mobile farm-management app for livestock activity and purchase/sale orders, integrated with the Finnegans GO ERP. Works offline and syncs to the cloud.
fstrack.longDesc: A mobile app for livestock management and purchase/sale orders, integrated with the Finnegans GO ERP. Built for the field: it works offline and syncs to the cloud once there's signal again.
highlights: Integration with the Finnegans GO ERP via API

nucleogym.name: NucleoGym
nucleogym.desc: App to track clients' gym workout routines, with exercise logging and progress tracking.
nucleogym.longDesc: An app for trainers and clients to track gym workout routines: exercises, sets and progress over time. Designed to be used comfortably from a phone.

wpp.name: AI WhatsApp Assistant
wpp.desc: Conversational assistant that lets employees log hours and manage tickets straight from WhatsApp, using natural language and voice. Integrates AI with the company ERP.
wpp.longDesc: A conversational assistant on WhatsApp that lets employees log hours and manage tickets using natural language and voice messages. Behind the scenes, an AI orchestration (GPT-4o) interprets the messages and integrates with the company ERP.
highlights: Hour logging by text and voice
GPT-4o AI to understand natural language
ERP integration via n8n and APIs

experience.heading: Experience & skills
experience.subtitle: Experience, education and the stack I work with.

fisterra.desc: Development and implementation on the Finnegans GO ERP: REST API integrations, process automation with n8n, scripting and stored procedures in SQL Server. Internal app development (web and mobile) and user tech support.

service.desc: Software and hardware maintenance and installation. Diagnosis, optimization and custom PC builds.

maintenance.desc: Software maintenance and computer tune-ups to speed up workflows.

analista.title: Higher Technical Degree in Information Systems Analysis

contact.heading: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or need tech support? Send me a message and let's chat.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
